title: Notifications of unsafe and noncompliant products
body: " This guide was converted to HTML format for accessibility reasons on 18 March 2025 and replaces the previous PDF document. It was also updated in relation to the implementation in December 2024 of Regulation 988/2023 on General Product Safety, and the increase in reporting in respect of Northern Ireland.   This guidance specifies how market surveillance authorities must use the Product Safety Database (PSD) to report unsafe and noncompliant products.  Access the PSD.  If you require any support in using the PSD, please contact opss.enquiries@businessandtrade.gov.uk.   Read information on serious undesirable effect (SUE) and safeguarding notifications for cosmetics.  "
